nasb.text: From them will proceed thanksgiving And the voice of those who celebrate; And I will multiply them and they will not be diminished; I will also honor them and they will not be insignificant.

esv.text: Out of them shall come songs of thanksgiving, and the voices of those who celebrate. I will multiply them, and they shall not be few; I will make them honored, and they shall not be small.

cnv.text: 必有感謝的歌聲， 和歡笑的聲音從其中發出來。 我必使他們人數增多，不會減少； 我必使他們得尊榮，不再被人輕看。

ccb.text: 那里必传出感谢和欢乐的声音。 我必使他们的人口增加， 不再减少； 我必使他们得享尊荣， 不再受歧视。
